nodes.name: 特立尼达岛
nodes.summary: 特立尼达岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联60种鸟类，包括小穴䳍、美洲瘤鸭、Dark-billed cuckoo等60种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 奥里诺科河
nodes.summary: 奥里诺科河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联23种鸟类，包括Spix's guan、红隐蜂鸟、啸鹭等23种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 成熟森林
nodes.summary: 具备成熟林冠和树洞资源的森林生境。

nodes.name: Golden-rumped euphonia
nodes.summary: Golden-rumped euphonia（Golden-rumped euphonia，学名 Chlorophonia cyanocephala），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于特立尼达岛、次生林、奥里诺科河，常见栖息地包括成熟森林。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in every mainland South American country except Chile and formerly was also found on Trinidad

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: https://www.museum.lsu.edu/~Remsen/SACCCountryLists.htm retrieved February 28, 2026 The golden-rumped euphonia inhabits a variety of somewhat open landscapes including secondary forest, the edges of mature forest, disturbed areas, and shade coffee plantations. In Venezuela it mostly ranges in elevation between north of the Orinoco River and between south of it; it occasionally is found down to sea level. It ranges between in Colombia, mostly between in Ecuador, mostly between and sometimes lower in Peru, and mostly between and sometimes lower in Brazil.{{cite book | last =Ridgely | first =Robert S
